      ernugraha

      About

      This site is maintained by ernugraha to share useful documentation and guides.

      Who is me?

      I am a programmer who likes to change linux settings until it eventually becomes a mess. But don’t worry, in this docs there is nothing messy (except when I am the one who is wrong).
